items.name: Pocket Organiser – American Alligator (N91553)
items.notes:
Crafted from genuine American Alligator (Alligator mississippiensis), this Louis Vuitton Pocket Organiser represents the pinnacle of exotic leather goods. The American alligator — prized above most crocodilians for its larger, more uniform scale pattern and exceptional skin quality — is the material of choice for the world's finest luxury houses. Each piece is unique by nature.

Despite its slim profile (3" × 4.4" × 0.4"), it is remarkably functional: five interior pockets, one exterior pocket, and three dedicated credit card slots. It slips effortlessly into a jacket pocket or bag without bulk — an everyday carry that happens to be an heirloom.

The Navy Blue colorway is rich and versatile, working equally well with tailored suiting or more casual dress.

Provenance & Documentation
This piece is accompanied by its original CITES export documentation issued in France, confirming the species as Alligator mississippiensis and certifying its legal origin. For serious collectors and international buyers, this documentation is essential and increasingly rare with pre-owned exotic goods.

SKU: N91553
Material: American Alligator (Alligator mississippiensis)
Color: Navy Blue
Dimensions: 3" × 4.4" × 0.4"
Original Retail: $2,630 USD
CITES Documentation: Included (issued in France)
Condition: Lightly Loved
